title: Fix event timestamps — store-cli.cjs zeros time component (#56)
description: store-cli.cjs event writer sets startTimestamp/endTimestamp to date-only (T00:00:00Z), making durationMinutes always 0. Fix to use real ISO timestamps with actual time-of-day.

plan.objective: Fix store-cli.cjs cmdEmit to normalize zeroed (T00:00:00Z) event timestamps to real wall-clock time and recompute durationMinutes.
key_changes: Add _isZeroedTimestamp() helper in CLI block to detect midnight-zeroed or absent timestamps
Add _normalizeEventTimestamps() helper that mutates event data in place before validation
Call _normalizeEventTimestamps(data) in cmdEmit canonical-event branch before schema validation
Add 4 regression tests in describe('store-cli.cjs — emit timestamp normalization (#56)')
